author: taulepton_
content: Have you considered introducing an optional fork_schedule_id in the config. So you could have something like chain_id = 20, fork_schedule_id = 1. This could be useful for having multiple chains with different chain_ids (to be used for transaction singing) but the same fork schedule (schedule 1 = mainnet).

author: jsign
content: I think this could also be possible; I can imagine the use-case you're thinking are native-rollups that would have different chain_ids but always stick to the same forking schedule as mainnet?

author: taulepton_
content: yes thats the idea but not sure if it's too soon to optimise for that use case to be honest - just thinking out loud
